name: Verastem, Inc.
business: Verastem markets AVMAPKI FAKZYNJA CO-PACK (avutometinib capsules; defactinib tablets) in the U.S. for adults with KRAS-mutated recurrent low-grade serous ovarian cancer who have received prior systemic therapy. The company also has a pipeline of clinical-stage and preclinical programs targeting RAS/MAPK pathway-driven cancers.

exposures.sentence: We market AVMAPKI FAKZYNJA CO-PACK (avutometinib capsules; defactinib tablets) in the United States ( U.S. ), the first treatment specifically FDA-approved for adults with KRAS-mutated recurrent low-grade serous ovarian cancer ( LGSOC ) who have received prior systemic therapy.

catalysts.event: Topline readout of primary endpoint in RAMP 301 confirmatory trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report a topline readout of the primary endpoint in mid-2027.

catalysts.event: Update on safety and efficacy of RAMP 205 expansion cohort
catalysts.sentence: we expect to report an update on the safety and efficacy of this expansion cohort in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Update on early dose-escalation data from VS-7375-101 trial
catalysts.sentence: We plan to report an update on early dose-escalation data from the VS-7375-101 trial in first half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Potential addressable market in KRAS G12D-mutated cancers at launch in the U.S. represents a multi-billion dollar opportunity with ability to treat approximately 40,000 patients annually across PDAC, NSCLC, CRC and other solid tumors.
tamClaims.sentence: According to external sources, market research, and internal analyses and calculations, we estimate the potential addressable market in KRAS G12D-mutated cancers at launch in the U.S. represents a multi-billion dollar opportunity with the ability to treat approximately 40,000 patients annually across either 1L or 2L treatment (with or without combination treatments) in PDAC, NSCLC, CRC and other solid tumors.
